questionHtml:
Three historical developments in physics were

I.  wave–particle duality
II.  the kinetic model
III.  the equivalence of mass and energy.

Which of these represented a paradigm shift in scientific thinking?

A.  I and II only

B.  I and III only

C.  II and III only

D.  I, II and III
